name: Zhang Hong (Zigang)
page_title: Zhang Hong (Zigang) 張紘 (子綱) [Wu, Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Zhang Hong and Zhang Zhao are not mentioned to be brothers in historic sources. They aren’t even specifically called brothers in the novel. [SGZ, ZZTJ, GoS]
	Died in 229 rather than 212 as described by the novel. [ZZTJ]

full_text:
Zhang Hong (Zigang) 張紘 (子綱)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Hong (張紘), styledZigang (子綱). Minister who served Wu. Suggested changing the capital to Sun Quan. Zhang Hong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom. Zhang Hong lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
